subcodes.first_line: O noble personage! Your letter hath been received. The East is the dawning-place of lights and the place of descent of divine revelation, ever radiant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شخص جلیل نامه شما رسید شرق مطلع انوار است و مهبط وحی پروردگار همواره شمس
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @light and darkness, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @unity; oneness of humanity
